description:
## Breakdown
- 38 Lint/WhitespaceAroundMacroExpression (auto-fix)
- 16 Lint/NotNil (manual — intentional SIP.intern usage)
- 14 Style/RedundantNilInControlExpression (auto-fix)
- 3 Lint/Formatting (auto-fix)
- 3 Metrics/CyclomaticComplexity (manual — may suppress)
- 3 Naming/BlockParameterName (manual)
- 1 Lint/TrailingRescueException (manual)
- 1 Lint/UnusedBlockArgument (manual)
- 1 Style/RedundantBegin (auto-fix)

## Strategy
1. Auto-fix ~56 findings with ameba --fix + crystal format
2. Manually fix remaining ~24
3. Suppress complexity warnings if splitting methods is out of scope
title: [EPIC] Fix 80 ameba findings across 10 files
